ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., batsman, bowler, all-rounder) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the league (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match pair */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player played for */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Whether the player was the captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_stats" (
  "bowling_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling stat */,
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-match pair */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Number of overs bowled */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs conceded per wicket */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate (runs conceded per over) */,
  "best_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowling_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_player_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_match_id") REFERENCES player_matches ("player_match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "batting_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting stat */,
  "player_match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-match pair */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours scored */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes scored */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate (runs scored per 100 balls) */,
  "average" REAL /* Average runs scored */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_match_id") REFERENCES player_matches ("player_match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "page_viewed" TEXT /* Page viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team pair */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the player played for the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "player_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-award pair */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
